name: How's fault decided in occupational disease claims since no one's 'at fault'?

mainEntity.name: How's fault decided in occupational disease claims since no one's 'at fault'?

acceptedAnswer.description: No-fault system; compensable if work caused or aggravated the illness, regardless of blame.[1][3] ODA focuses on exposure causation, not negligence.[1] Key factors: substantial work risk increase, medical nexus. Employer negligence irrelevant unless intentional tort proven rarely.[1] Benefits flow from proof alone.
